name: synapse
description: A vocabulary learning plugin with spaced repetition and matching games

scripts.build:angular:bundle: cd src/angular && node -e "const esbuild = require('esbuild'); const fs = require('fs'); const files = fs.readdirSync('dist/synapse-angular/browser'); const mainFile = files.find(f => f.startsWith('main-') && f.endsWith('.js')); esbuild.buildSync({ entryPoints: ['dist/synapse-angular/browser/' + mainFile], bundle: true, platform: 'browser', outfile: '../../dist/angular-ui.js', format: 'iife', minify: true });"
scripts.build: npm run build:angular && npm run build:angular:bundle && npm run build:plugin && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/
